name: QA 1433
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1433

pmproxy rc script stop/start with timeseries option.



Copyright (c) 2019 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream8-container reproduce
